## Security-sensitive Change Checklist

- [ ] This PR changes hook handling, rewrite behavior, config loading, or verification behavior
- [ ] I explained the security impact in plain language
- [ ] I linked the affected spec or backlog item
- [ ] I included test evidence
- [ ] I called out any trust-boundary or release-verification implications
